data.name: 見習魔女犬子醬
data.detailed_description:
在絕望之中，蒼之魔術師艾奧斯遇見了一隻擁有驚人魔法天賦的犬丸。他將其收為徒弟，命名為「犬子」，並決定栽培她成為自己的傳承者。

數年過去，犬子從犬丸化為人形，如今已是前途看好的見習魔法師……但眼下，她正陷入大麻煩！

她最心愛的師父竟強迫她接受魔法公會所頒下的嚴苛試煉，若不通過，不但無法成為正式魔女，還將被逐出門牆！

為了繼續留在艾奧斯身邊，為了讓他終於回應自己的愛意，犬子毅然決定接受挑戰！

師父究竟為何這麼執著要她參加考驗？遺跡之中藏著什麼秘密？

她是否真能突破考驗，征服神秘遺跡，成為一名貨真價實的魔女？

這場令人期待的冒險，即將揭曉答案！

你將扮演見習魔女犬子，挑戰通過成為正式魔女的試煉，踏入充滿危機與未知的遺跡之中！

獨特的卡牌戰鬥系統將為你帶來每回合都驚心動魄的刺激！

發現上百張具有不同元素屬性的卡牌，任你自由組合、打造專屬戰鬥卡組。

搭配多種職業、裝備與神器，讓這場艱難試煉稍稍變得“可攻克”一些！

收集戰利品、管理牌組，踏入危機四伏的地下迷宮，敵人與陷阱無處不在！

而在這場殘酷的挑戰中，失敗並不代表結束。

每一次“重新來過”都是一次進步的契機，讓你變得更強、更聰明，為下一輪做足準備！

勝利，總是在下一回合等你！

——抽牌吧！

選擇會影響結局

在試煉中，你將遇到各種事件：有人求助、有人找麻煩。你可以選擇忽視、協助或懲罰，這些選擇都會改變你的結局。

本作有多重結局與難度，即便最低難度也絕非簡單挑戰，小心應對！

妥善管理卡組

卡牌不難取得，但屬性多樣、種類繁多，建立有效卡組至關重要。

有些卡可能沒用甚至有害，而另一些則能巧妙組合出驚人效果。

刪去妨礙卡、強化好卡，打造能應對一切敵人的專屬卡組！

高度緊湊的戰鬥系統

敵人也會放大招、打連擊，並非等著你打的靶子。

一點點判斷失誤，就可能導致全局潰敗。

但別怕失敗！每次失敗都是通往勝利的階梯。提升技能、強化能力，帶著戰利品再度挑戰！

多樣事件與隨機遭遇

遺跡裡藏有各式事件，有些給你神器與裝備，有些會阻撓甚至終結你的旅程。

謹慎抉擇，時時保持警覺，才能走得更遠。

data.short_description: 在這款卡牌戰鬥Rogue-lite RPG中，陪同主角犬子挑戰神秘遺跡，目標是成為真正的魔女！收集卡牌與裝備，打造專屬戰鬥套牌勇闖試煉！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Little Witch Inuko
data.detailed_description:
In a pit of despair, The Blue Mage Aios met an Inumaru with an astonishing talent for magic. He took the Inumaru under his wing and named it Inuko, deciding to nurture it as his disciple to continue his legacy.

After several years, Inuko, the Inumaru turned human, is maturing into a fine young mage with a bright future... but now, she's in a pinch! Her master, whom she loves so much, is forcing her to undertake a grueling test from the mage guild to become a full-fledged witch! And to make matters worse, he told her that if she fails, he will drop her as his student!

Determined to not only remain by Aios' side as a student, but to finally make him look her way and accept her love, Inuko has resolved to take up the challenge!

Why did her master go to such lengths to make her participate in the test? What is waiting for her in the ruins? And will she be able to conquer the mysterious dungeon and become a full-fledged witch?

Find out as this exciting journey unfolds!

Play as the apprentice witch Inuko in her test to become a full-fledged witch. Traverse the ruins filled with danger and surprise.

Experience the unique card battle system that will bring you thrill and surprises at every turn! Discover hundreds of cards with various elements which you can combine to make your own personal battle deck. Use a wide variety of classes, equipment, and artifacts to make this dauntingly hard test a teeny bit easier. Collect loot, curate your deck, and traverse the dungeon carefully as you come across all sorts of enemies and traps.

And in this perilous dungeon, defeat is not the end! Every venture forth and game over is just another step forward which will make you stronger and sharper as you strengthen yourself to prepare for the next run!

Victory is always just another turn away! DRAW!

Your Decision Matters

During the test, you may encounter some troublemakers or a person in distress. Deciding between ignoring them, helping them, or punishing them, which will have an impact on the end results of your test. The game has multiple endings and difficulties, but prepare yourself well, as even the easiest difficulty still brings challenges that will keep you on your toes!

Deck Management

Cards are easy to get, but there are several elements and hundreds of cards to choose from, which makes deck management important. Not every card is useful to you, some might even hinder you in battle. Others may combine in novel ways to bring even the toughest enemies to their knees. Discard cards that may hinder you, enhance cards that you find helpful, and create the ultimate deck that can face off against any foe!

Exciting Battle System

Plan your moves carefully, as the enemies have several tricks up their sleeves, and more than a few aces hidden away. You aren't the only one who can make deadly combos. Even the simplest enemy is not to be underestimated, as a few wrong moves are all it takes to lose a battle.

Every defeat and game over is just a step closer to conquering the ruins. Learn from past mistakes, level up your skills, upgrade your stats, and bring all the items you found from your previous runs on your next attempt.

Lots of Events & Encounters

The ruins are filled with various surprises and encounters for you to discover. Some might bring you new equipment, artifacts, and items... And others might try their best to hinder your journey to come, or end it outright if you aren't careful. Choose wisely and be vigilant.

data.short_description: Join Inuko in this card battle rogue-lite RPG as she tries to conquer the mysterious ruins to earn the rank of a full-fledged witch! Collect and combine a wide variety of cards and equipment to build and personalise your battle deck and blast your way through the ruins!
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
